objects.name: setMainAddress
objects.comment: This node takes all the addresses from CorporateAccountAddress and moves every not-main address ("MainIndicator": false) to the field AdditionalCorporateAccountAddresses.

objects.name: splitAdditionalAddresses
objects.comment: all the accounts where AdditionalCorporateAccountAddresses are not empty will also be moved to the "AdditionalAddresses" exit, so that the additional addresses can later be converted to notes.

options.script: "Weitere Adressen, die in SAP vorhanden waren:\n" + $('FormattedPostalAddressDescription')

objects.name: c4cAddress2hsNote
objects.comment: maps the FormattedPostalAddressDescription and the account the address is for to a hubspot Note productType

objects.name: flattenAdresses
objects.comment: if there are more than one additional addresses a row for each address is created and the formatted address set to the field FormattedPostalAddressDescription.

objects.name: testForLeadsWithoutContacts
objects.comment:
merges Leads with Contacts to see if there is a lead without a linked contact
Main: Contact
Second: Lead

objects.name: testForLeadsWithoutCompanys
objects.comment:
merges Leads with Companies to see if there is a lead without a linked company.
Main: Company
Second: Lead

objects.name: c4cLead2hsLead
objects.comment: maps the sap c4c lead attributes to the hs_Lead productType for hubspot

objects.name: c4cOpp2hsDeal
objects.comment: maps the c4c opportunity entity to the hubspot Deal entity

objects.name: splitTexts2Notes
objects.comment: separates the notes from the opportunities, as they are in json arrays (OpportunityTextCollection), so that they can later be converted into notes

objects.name: c4cText2hsNote
objects.comment: maps the notes of the c4c opportunities to notes, which then have to be reattached to the Deal in HS

objects.name: flattenTexts
objects.comment: grabs the content from the json notes so that it can be transformed to a Hubspot Note
